## Congress System: Comprehensive Architecture Map

### Triggering

Congress is triggered by a `[congress] <topic>` Discord message. The workflow receives `topic`, `chat_id`, `message_id`, `discord_user`, and an optional `personas` list (for manually specifying the roster).
